measurement_note: Size is S = n + q; each tier uses q = n full-range queries. Values cycle through 1..100, so every answer is one. Prefix frequencies cost O(S*V) for fixed V=100. Correct per-query subarray copying, deduplication, and sorting completes all tiers but fails only by superlinear scaling.
